MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Gilberg Jay, Clerks C. Amador/K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Philip Tam, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Cindy Lee representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Jim J. Madden is present.
JR Gabbard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date of September 27, 2007 is off calendar.
